title: BNN Bloomberg/AP: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 Sol access during U.S. review
friendlyTitle: OpenAI is rolling out its newest model more slowly
summary: The Associated Press reports that OpenAI is limiting access to GPT-5.6 Sol to a small group of government-approved trusted partners while the U.S. reviews cybersecurity and national-security risks. OpenAI described the phased release as temporary and said the model is intended to help find and fix vulnerabilities.
friendlySummary: OpenAI is giving GPT-5.6 Sol to only a small approved group while U.S. officials review possible security risks. OpenAI says broader access should come later.
whyItMatters: Frontier AI access is becoming a policy and security negotiation, not just a product launch. Developers and businesses may increasingly see advanced models released in stages, with eligibility, geography, and risk reviews affecting availability.
friendlyWhyItMatters: New AI models may not always arrive for everyone at once. Rules and safety reviews could affect who gets access first.
